# Database1st-ArtGallery

An ASP.NET MVC web application designed for managing art gallery operations, developed using the **Database-First** approach with Entity Framework.

##  Features
* **Art Gallery Management:** Track and manage artworks, artists, and sales records.
* **Database-First Architecture:** Automatically generated models and DbContext using reverse engineering from an existing SQL Server database.
* **Secure Architecture:** Role-based authorization for admin and general users.
* **Responsive UI:** Dynamic data views with sorting, searching, and custom pagination.

##  Tech Stack
* **Backend:** ASP.NET Core MVC (C#)
* **ORM:** Entity Framework Core (Database-First)
* **Database:** SQL Server
* **Frontend:** Razor Views, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, jQuery, AJAX

##  Getting Started

To run this project locally, follow these steps:

### Prerequisites
* Visual Studio 2022 or VS Code
* .NET SDK (matching the project version)
* SQL Server LocalDB or SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS)

### Installation & Setup
1. **Clone the repository:**
   ```bash
   git clone [https://github.com/jannatferdous-bd/Database1st-ArtGallery.git](https://github.com/jannatferdous-bd/Database1st-ArtGallery.git)
